glossary.subject: FE assigned for {{mappings.orderType}} with order no:{{mappings.orderNumber}} for site:{{mappings.siteId}}
glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

For {{mappings.orderType}} order with order no.: {{mappings.orderNumber}}, FE Engineer {{mappings.feEngineer}} has been assigned to start Patching on {{mappings.patchingStartDate}} for the device {{mappings.deviceName}} at site: {{mappings.siteId}}

Note: The required device upgrade software version is {{mappings.softwareVersion}}.
Please check {{ mappings.url }} for more details.

Thank You!
glossary.footerText: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.
